description: Conservative routeable model families that ZeroAPI currently documents as practical subscription-first policy targets.

families.label: OpenAI GPT-5.5 core family
families.notes: OpenClaw v2026.4.23 defaults OpenAI and OpenAI Codex to gpt-5.5. gpt-5.5-pro is provider-supported as forward-compatible metadata, but Artificial Analysis does not publish a separate benchmark row yet; use gpt-5.5 as the proxy if a custom policy enables gpt-5.5-pro.

families.label: Kimi K2 core family
families.notes: OpenClaw v2026.4.20 defaults Moonshot to kimi-k2.6. Starter configs use kimi-k2.5 benchmark values as a transparent proxy until Artificial Analysis publishes a matching kimi-k2-6 row.

families.label: MiniMax M2.7 core family
families.notes: OpenClaw exposes MiniMax subscription routing through minimax-portal. The benchmark snapshot currently has a direct row only for MiniMax-M2.7. Starter metadata keeps the core M2.7 route text-only unless the runtime config explicitly marks an image-capable MiniMax model.

families.label: Qwen Portal coder routeable family
families.notes: OpenClaw currently exposes Qwen through qwen-portal/coder-model. Artificial Analysis tracks named Qwen releases, so ZeroAPI uses Qwen3.6 Plus as the closest benchmark proxy for this portal route. Qwen VL or Omni routes are not auto-added to starter configs unless a user explicitly configures an image-capable runtime model.
